commands.repair_reason: The protected maintainer label and broad cross-surface hardening make this an explicit maintainer landing decision, not a ClawSweeper close or repair job.; Cleared: The patch is security-relevant hardening and I found no new dependency, workflow, permission, install-script, or secret-handling regression in the diff. commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens gateway auth cleanup, Claude session path handling, plugin activation and metadata validation, model suppression, apply-patch behavior, diagnostic redaction, peer-link safety, topology reporting, tests, and changelog coverage.

Reproducibility: no. I did not independently run a high-confidence reproduction in this read-only review. Several addressed cases are source-reproducible from current main, and the PR body reports focused regression tests for them.
commands.review_followup: The protected maintainer label and broad cross-surface hardening make this an explicit maintainer landing decision, not a ClawSweeper close or repair job.
